title: RealGronds Dimensional World
description: Adds a dedicated Mining Dimension for quarrying and testing, keeping your Overworld untouched.
body:
A lightweight mining-dimension mod inspired by Aroma1997’s Dimensional World.  
Simple to set up, safe to quarry, and keeps your Overworld pristine.

_Not affiliated with or endorsed by Aroma1997._

![Lit portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b502093f687a924124cd8c33a9b59343863c0d4.png)

## Features
- **Mining Dimension**  
  A flat, stone-heavy world designed for automation and large-scale mining.  
  - Plains biome with decorations.  
  - Mineshafts for exploration variety.  

- **Simple Portal System**  
  - Build a **4×5 frame** (outside size) using **Dimensional World Portal Frame** blocks, leaving a 2×3 hole.  
  - Light it with the **Artifact Ender Gem**.  
  - Portals toggle between the **Overworld** and the mining dimension.  
  - Portals **cannot** be lit or used in the Nether or End.  
  - Exit portals are generated automatically if none exist (world-border aware).  

## Crafting Recipes
**Artifact Ender Gem**  
![Ender Gem Recipe](https://github.com/RealGrond/dimensional-world/raw/main/imgs/recipe_endergem.png)  

**Portal Frame**  
![Portal Frame Recipe](https://github.com/RealGrond/dimensional-world/raw/main/imgs/recipe_portal_frame.png)  

## How to Build the Portal
1. Build a **4×5 frame** (outside size) from Portal Frame blocks.  
2. Leave a **2×3 interior opening**.  
3. Use the **Artifact Ender Gem** on the frame (Overworld only).  
4. Step inside to travel to the mining dimension.  

Notes:  
- Portals **don’t work in the Nether or End**.  
- The **Ender Gem is consumed** when first lighting a portal.  

## World Generation
- Flat, mining-friendly world (stone-focused).  
- Plains biome with natural decorations.  
- Mineshafts for exploration.  
- Optimized for performance and automation.  

## Credits
- Inspired by: Aroma1997’s Dimensional World  
- Textures: [Malcolmriley’s unused textures](https://github.com/malcolmriley/unused-textures) (CC0)
